name: The Fool
upright: Leap of faith, curiosity, willingness to reset even without guarantees.
reversed: Impulsivity, refusing to ground plans, or naively repeating cycles.

name: The Magician
upright: Channeling intent into action; coordination between mind, body, speech.
reversed: Scattered energy, manipulation, or doubting your tools.

name: The High Priestess
upright: Staying with the unknown, processing information beneath the surface.
reversed: Withholding truth, ignoring intuition, or emotional shutdown.

name: The Empress
upright: Somatic safety, relational generosity, bringing ideas into form.
reversed: Over-caregiving, depletion, or creative stagnation.

name: The Emperor
upright: Owning responsibility and building systems that protect growth.
reversed: Rigidity, dominance, or rejecting accountability.

name: The Hierophant
upright: Learning from lineage, defining values, agreeing on shared language.
reversed: Dogma, hollow conformity, resisting your own philosophy.

name: The Lovers
upright: Choosing with full awareness, integrating dualities, transparent bonding.
reversed: Decision paralysis, fractured priorities, misaligned agreements.

name: The Chariot
upright: Harnessed willpower, emotional regulation in motion, disciplined progress.
reversed: Burnout, forced speed, or lack of integration between desire and action.

name: Strength
upright: Soft power, listening to the body, transforming instinct through care.
reversed: Force, self-doubt, or suppressing emotion instead of meeting it.

name: The Hermit
upright: Intentional retreat, processing experience, guiding from integrity.
reversed: Isolation, avoidance, or over-intellectualizing feelings.

name: Wheel of Fortune
upright: Accepting change, adaptive optimism, tracking repeating lessons.
reversed: Clinging to control, blaming luck, ignoring feedback loops.

name: Justice
upright: Clear agreements, lawful consequences, integrating logic with compassion.
reversed: Bias, withholding facts, or weaponizing fairness.

name: The Hanged One
upright: Yielding to process, seeing from another angle, gestation period.
reversed: Stagnation, martyrdom, or refusing to release control.

name: Death
upright: Honoring endings, composting the past, making room for authenticity.
reversed: Attachment to decay, fear of transformation, unresolved grief.

name: Temperance
upright: Mixing elements intentionally, pacing change, somatic regulation.
reversed: Extremes, imbalance, or skipping the integration phase.

name: The Devil
upright: Naming patterns that own you, conscious rebellion, transmuting shame.
reversed: Breaking chains, detoxing, or denial of addictive cycles.

name: The Tower
upright: Rapid dismantling of false structures, necessary course correction.
reversed: Avoiding the inevitable, prolonged instability, suppressed emotion erupting later.

name: The Star
upright: Post-crisis healing, reconnecting to purpose, generosity seeded in truth.
reversed: Cynicism, depletion, or spiritual bypassing.

name: The Moon
upright: Navigating liminal states, intuition, subconscious material surfacing.
reversed: Fog, projection, or drowning in unprocessed feelings.

name: The Sun
upright: Confidence, transparency, life-affirming action.
reversed: Ego burns, comparison, or performative brightness that hides fatigue.

name: Judgement
upright: Integrating past cycles, honest review, definitive decision making.
reversed: Self-criticism, stagnation, or ignoring the wake-up call.

name: The World
upright: Synthesis, graduation, and joyful closure with lessons embodied.
reversed: Delayed completion, loose ends, or struggling to release identity tied to the journey.
